description_long: This is a modern, three-piece faucet set featuring a central spout flanked by two lever handles. The spout is rectangular with a flat top and a slightly curved neck, designed for deck mounting on a sink or countertop. Both handles are short, flat levers, positioned symmetrically on either side of the spout, likely for hot and cold water control. The entire set has a sleek, dark metallic finish, giving it a contemporary and minimalistic appearance. The surfaces are smooth and reflective, suggesting a polished metal construction. There are no visible hose attachments or sprayers integrated into the design.
description: A sleek, dark metallic three-piece faucet set with a rectangular spout and two flat lever handles, featuring a modern, polished finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular spout centered between two flat lever handles, all with a dark metallic finish.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the spout's curved neck and the profile of one lever handle, emphasizing the set's slim, modern design.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the spout and both handles visible, showing the symmetry and flat surfaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, displaying the spout's curve and the other lever handle's profile.
